cross_scene_arcs.title: From Collapse to Vengeance: The Survival Imperative
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Chev Chelios transitions from a state of sudden physiological collapse to a hyper-driven survival mission, where every action is dictated by the need to maintain adrenaline and counteract the poison. This arc traces his evolution from passive victim to active agent of survival, relying on extreme stimulation, stimulants, and improvised medical solutions to stay alive.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Chev is physically compromised and disoriented, unaware of the cause of his deterioration.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Chev has internalized the 'keep moving' imperative and developed a functional, though fragile, survival strategy using epinephrine and sensory overload.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The long-term sustainability of his adrenaline-dependent survival remains uncertain, and no permanent cure is in sight.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Fracturing of Trust: Betrayal and Isolation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Chev's relationships with his allies and superiors deteriorate as he uncovers layers of betrayal. From Carlito's cold refusal to help, to Kaylo's suspected treachery, and finally rejecting Doctor Miles' offer of euthanasia, Chev becomes increasingly isolated, transforming his mission from one of loyalty to solitary vengeance.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Chev seeks help from Carlito, expecting support from his former boss.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Chev rejects medical mercy and chooses a final hour of vengeance, fully severed from institutional or personal support.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The full extent of the conspiracy against Chev and whether any ally remains loyal is never clarified.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Hunted: The Escalation of External Threats
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Chev's conflict expands beyond the initial poisoning to include pursuit by law enforcement, public exposure, and psychological warfare. What begins as a private medical crisis evolves into a multi-front battle where Chev must evade police, media, and Verona's network while racing against time.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Chev discovers a mysterious tape, signaling the beginning of a targeted threat.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Chev is a publicly hunted fugitive, simultaneously evading police and a psychopathic killer while physically deteriorating.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Chev has no clear strategy to neutralize the dual threat of law enforcement and Verona's network, leaving his escape uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Target to Avenger: The Reversal of Power
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Chev undergoes a dramatic status shift—from poisoned victim to dominant aggressor in his conflict with Ricky Verona. By seizing Verona's brother's phone, taking the family medallion, and exposing Verona's fratricide, Chev turns psychological and symbolic warfare into tools of dominance, reversing the power dynamic.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Chev is disoriented and reactive, learning he has been poisoned and is dying.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Chev psychologically destabilizes Verona, asserting control through knowledge and symbolic theft, flipping the hunter-prey dynamic.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Verona's full emotional and strategic response to this reversal remains unresolved, setting up a final confrontation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Love and Abandonment: The Cost of the Mission
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Chev's relationship with Eve deteriorates under the pressure of his mission and physical decline. Initially dependent on her for help, he ultimately abandons her to evade capture, sacrificing their emotional bond for operational survival. This arc highlights the human cost of his relentless pursuit.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Chev needs Eve's help to communicate and stabilize, showing dependence and intimacy.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Chev leaves Eve behind in public humiliation, severing their connection to preserve his mission.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The emotional fallout and possibility of reconciliation are left entirely unresolved, with Eve's fate uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Illusion of Control and Emotional Withdrawal
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eve maintains emotional distance through technological detachment and passive resistance, reinforcing her role as an unattainable figure in Chev's life. Her repeated avoidance of direct engagement underscores a pattern of self-protection that gradually erodes as Chev's crisis intrudes on her world.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Eve remains unreachable, reinforcing her emotional distance and self-protective stance.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Eve attempts to assert control by walking away, but Chev's persistence undermines her autonomy, placing her on the defensive.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Eve's discomfort is evident, but she does not confront Chev directly, leaving the tension unresolved and her boundaries unestablished.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Forced Re-Entry into Chaos
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eve's tranquil life is violently disrupted by Chev's return and the encroachment of external threats. As danger escalates—from Chev's erratic behavior to the antagonist's arrival—her sense of safety collapses, forcing her into a reactive role within a conflict she neither understands nor controls.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Eve leaves her apartment with Chev, though emotionally wounded and alienated by his hostility, signaling reluctant re-engagement with his crisis.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Eve is emotionally distressed but compliant, placed under Chev's tactical control and assigned a key role in the operation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Eve's suppressed aggression and emotional volatility suggest potential conflict with Chev's authority or mission parameters later.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Shattered Trust and Identity Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eve's perception of Chev shifts from confusion to disillusionment as his lies unravel and his behavior becomes increasingly unstable. The revelation of his true identity and desperate actions fracture any remaining trust, culminating in a traumatic breakdown of their emotional and physical connection.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: She remains present despite visible discomfort and revulsion, indicating conflicted emotional investment and a potential pivot in her intentions toward Chev.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: The relationship reaches a breaking point—Eve responds with fear, violence, and rejection as Chev's behavior becomes uncontrollable and threatening.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Eve is left terrified and confused, unable to comprehend Chev's condition or how to help him, while Chev's life continues to deteriorate without support

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Detachment to Survival Partnership
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eve transitions from emotional numbness to active participation in Chev's survival, ultimately embracing a life-or-death mission despite her trauma. Her arc culminates in a quiet moment of closure, where she receives Chev's final message, completing her shift from passive observer to committed partner in crisis.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Eve is emotionally paralyzed, standing face-to-face with the brutal reality of Chev's condition, marking a deepening of her emotional investment in his survival.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Confronted with Chev's final acknowledgment of fault and love, potentially reshaping her emotional perspective on their relationship.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Eve's immediate emotional response is not shown, leaving her internal reaction and potential grief or reconciliation unexplored.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Unseen Threat and Rising Vulnerability
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eve's status shifts from insulated observer to high-risk target as unseen forces close in. Her ignorance of the true danger contrasts with the growing threat to her safety, highlighting her vulnerability and the fragility of her perceived control over her environment.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: The source and purpose of the timer Eve references remains unclear, as does her ultimate allegiance or objective in the situation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Eve remains psychologically detached and alienated, reinforcing her fragility and disconnection from others.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Eve's lack of emotional response underscores her unresolved inner turmoil and inability to connect with the urgency of the situation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Poisoned Vendetta: From Assassin to Hunted
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ricky Verona initiates a deadly conflict by poisoning Chev Chelios, positioning himself as the unseen mastermind. As Chev survives and turns the tables, Verona shifts from predator to prey, culminating in their final midair confrontation where the power dynamic inverts completely.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Verona is in control, orchestrating Chev's death from a distance with sadistic confidence.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Verona is defeated and killed by Chev during a midair struggle, his control and life both lost.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Verona dies believing he has won, unaware of Chev's final surge of strength.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Fractured Loyalty and Family Betrayal
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Verona's relationships with his criminal associates and, especially, his brother Alex unravel as debts, betrayals, and hidden guilt surface. The revelation of his fratricide and the loss of Alex to Chev expose deep emotional fractures beneath his ruthless exterior.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Verona is a fugitive from his own allies due to unpaid debts, with his loyalty already in question.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Verona is emotionally shattered by the loss of his brother and consumed by a personal vendetta rooted in guilt and pride.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The full truth of Verona's role in his brother's death remains unexplained, lingering as a psychological wound.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Psychological Warfare and the Erosion of Control
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Verona attempts to dominate Chev through psychological terror, but as Chev closes in, Verona's authority collapses. His public humiliation and physical mutilation mark his fall from feared enforcer to broken outcast.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Verona wields psychological power by threatening Chev's girlfriend, asserting dominance from afar.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Verona is physically dismembered, disarmed, and reduced to crawling—his status as a fearsome figure destroyed.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Despite his degradation, Verona remains present and dangerous, suggesting a lingering threat even in defeat.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Final Power Reversal: From Captor to Captive to Conqueror
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Verona's status fluctuates dramatically—from presumed captured, to regaining control through ambush, to seizing the helicopter and appearing victorious, only to lose everything in the final moments. This arc captures the volatile swings of power, agency, and fate in the climax.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Verona is captured and under Kaylo's custody, stripped of autonomy.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Verona briefly regains dominance but ultimately dies midair, defeated by the man he tried to destroy.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Chev's survival despite the syringe injection and coronary collapse defies Verona's expectations, leaving his final moments filled with shock.
